kpis.name: Mean Time To Repair
kpis.description: Average time in hours to restore equipment after failure

kpis.name: System Uptime
kpis.description: Percentage of scheduled time that assets are operational

kpis.name: PM Completion Rate
kpis.description: Percentage of planned preventive maintenance tasks completed on time

kpis.name: Reactive Maintenance Rate
kpis.description: Percentage of reactive work orders resolved within SLA

kpis.name: Customer Satisfaction Score
kpis.description: Weighted average customer satisfaction from post-service surveys

kpis.name: SLA Compliance
kpis.description: Percentage of service requests handled within contracted SLA terms

kpis.name: Break-Fix Response Rate
kpis.description: Percentage of break-fix calls attended within priority target time

kpis.name: System Availability
kpis.description: Overall availability including planned and unplanned downtime

kpis.name: Invoice Cycle Time
kpis.description: Average days from service completion to invoice generation

kpis.name: Contract Coverage Rate
kpis.description: Percentage of active assets covered under a maintenance contract
